category_sources: Official repository README calls it the Hugging Face Official MCP Server.
source_facts.description says hf-mcp-server is an MCP Server for Hugging Face.
display_name_sources: Official repository README uses Hugging Face Official MCP Server.
source_facts.description expands the package as MCP Server for Hugging Face.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage redirects to the official huggingface/hf-mcp-server repository; README is the primary documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty, so repo was determined from source_facts.homepage, which redirects from evalstate/hf-mcp-server to huggingface/hf-mcp-server.
tags_sources: Official README says it connects LLMs to the Hugging Face Hub and Gradio AI applications.
source_facts.description identifies Hugging Face and MCP server functionality.
